textToShare:

tipsToSearchData: Due to data provider (TheMovieDB) limitations, some titles may not be available. If a title is not found, please try searching for the full name. For example, search for 'Kamen Rider Drive' instead of just 'Drive'. Additionally, search using the title only; adding terms like 'tv-2014' will not work.
